data.body: Rebased stack (6fe2+e622) onto current origin/main 89e59453 -- picks up the enrich-prune flake fix. Resolved 1 conflict (event-schema.md CREATE row: merged my creation_channel clause + upstream's inline session_log anchor); _processors.py + architecture.md auto-merged. Post-rebase all green: 6fe2 oracle 23, e622 oracle 9+5, the previously-flaky enrich test now PASSES (fix in base), lint+typecheck clean. Pushed: #764 6fe2 patchset 3, #765 e622 NEW -- both on current base, CI should pass + LLM-Review re-runs. Now story 568c (SNAPSHOT durability), stacked on e622.
